articles.title: Man City beat Southampton 2-1 to reach FA Cup final
articles.description:
Nico Gonzalez’s late stunner sends Man City to the FA Cup final with a 2-1 comeback victory over Southampton, keeping their treble hopes alive.

articles.title: Eze does it for Arsenal as Arteta's men reclaim top spot
articles.description: Eberechi Eze's brilliant early strike fired Arsenal back to the top of the Premier League as they ground out a much needed 1-0 win against Newcastle at the Emirates Stadium.

articles.title: Finn Azaz wonder goal not enough for Southampton as Man City reach fourth successive FA Cup final
articles.description: Manchester City produced a dramatic late fightback to reach their fourth successive FA Cup final with a thrilling win over Championship Southampton.

articles.title: Arsenal go top but suffer injuries in Newcastle win
articles.description: Arsenal moved three points above Manchester City at the top of the Premier League with a nervy 1-0 win over Newcastle in which Kai Havertz and Eberechi Eze had to come off with injuries.

articles.title: Mikel Arteta reaction — What did Arsenal manager say after slim win over Newcastle?
